name: Log Stream
description: Monospace-aligned vertical stream of timestamped log/event lines, the right-panel LOGS content. Each line: dim timestamp → level-colored prefix (INFO/WARN/ERR/DEBUG) → message text. The most recent line may show a blinking block cursor █ to indicate active streaming. Lines are dense (var(--leading-tight)) with no inter-line gaps.

representativeVariants.msg: Worker-06 连接超时，自动重启

anatomy.description: Leading HH:MM:SS, var(--text-xs), color var(--color-text-muted), fixed-width
4-char padded prefix aligned in a fixed column. Color: info→var(--color-info), warn→var(--color-warning), error→var(--color-error), debug→var(--color-text-muted), success→var(--color-success)
Rest of line, color var(--color-text-primary), wraps with hanging indent
Blinking █ at the end of the latest line when streamState=live. Color var(--color-accent-bright)

structurePatterns: display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0 (no inter-line gap)
font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: var(--text-xs); line-height: var(--leading-tight)
Each line: display: grid; grid-template-columns: auto auto 1fr; align-items: baseline
Timestamp + prefix use white-space: pre to preserve alignment
usageHints: Auto-scroll to bottom when new entries arrive (streamState=live)
Pause on user scroll-up; show a '↓ resume' hint at the bottom edge
Cap visible history to ~500 lines for performance; older entries evicted from top
doNotInvent: Do not add zebra striping — terminal logs are uniformly dense
Do not add hover background to individual lines unless a click-to-inspect action exists
